metric.description: Metric identifier to be used as `metrics` input in the FactSet Estimate endpoints.

name.description: Plain text name of the metric.

category.description: Primary Category of metric item, such as, FINANCIAL_STATEMENT or INDUSTRY_METRIC

subcategory.description: Sub-category of metric items, such as the INCOME_STATEMENT or AIRLINES.

OAurl.description: The Online Assistant Page URL, used to lookup the definition and methodology of the requested item.
